title: BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates family as a Subject Matter Expert in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates:
BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates!
